demographics.living_situation: lives at home with his wife, who is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower back is aching so deeply I can't sleep or stand up, and I've been struggling to pass urine for months.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The back pain has become unbearable over the last two days and I can't walk or get comfortable — my wife rang because I couldn't get out of bed.

symptom_narrative.onset: the waterworks trouble came on slowly over about the past year; the deep back pain started around four weeks ago and got dramatically worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: urinary problems roughly a year; back pain four weeks, severe for two days
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, constant, aching pain low in the back and pelvis; the urine stream is weak and hard to get started
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the back pain is the worst I've ever had — I can't sleep, can't stand, can't find any position that helps
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low back and pelvis, and the waterworks
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the back pain is there all the time, worst at night and when I'm lying still; it doesn't ease off when I move
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — the heat pack and the paracetamol do absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying still and night-time; I just can't get comfortable
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: weak urine stream, going more often, trouble getting started; I've lost about 6 kilos without trying and my appetite is gone; I've had trouble with erections recently; both my ankles have gone a bit puffy. No blood in the urine. No loss of control of my bowels or bladder, no numbness between my legs, and my legs aren't suddenly weak.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had back pain anything like this before; the urinary symptoms I just put down to getting older and never got them checked
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been stuck in bed for two days — I can't walk, stand or sleep with this pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing waterworks trouble — weak stream, going often, trouble starting — that I never had checked because I thought it was just age

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: elderly man, lives at home with his wife who is present; was fully independent until the last few weeks

objective_data_offered.value: he can't stand or walk and has been bedbound for the last two days because of the back pain
he's lost about 6 kilos over the last couple of months without trying
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated, not measured on scales at home

objective_data_offered.value: he looks very pale and gaunt, has clearly lost weight, and is in a lot of distress lying rigidly in bed
both his ankles look a bit puffy and swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual impression over video, not examined or pressure-tested

objective_data_offered.value: he's been using a heat pack continuously and it gives no relief at all
